question: Show names of clubs that have players with more than 2 win counts.
sql: SELECT c.Name FROM club c JOIN player p ON c.Club_ID = p.Club_ID GROUP BY c.Club_ID HAVING MAX(p.Wins_count) > 2;

back_translation.intent: 查询具有超过2次胜利的球员所属的俱乐部名称

semantic.reason: 缺少GROUP BY和HAVING子句，导致无法正确筛选出至少包含一个胜场数超过2的球员的俱乐部
